query: Analyze this threat report and map the behavior to MITRE ATT&CK techniques.
report_text:
Summary: The intrusion involved script-based execution and payload staging.

Observed Activity: The attacker executed encoded PowerShell commands on the host. The script then used Invoke-WebRequest to download payload.exe from a remote server.

Indicators: powershell -enc, Invoke-WebRequest, payload.exe.

Analyst Note: No clear persistence behavior was observed.

query: Identify likely ATT&CK techniques in this incident summary.
report_text: Incident note: malware launched cmd.exe /c from a user directory. After execution, it ran dir commands to inspect local folders and used systeminfo and whoami to collect host and user information.

query: Map the described behavior to ATT&CK techniques.
report_text: The adversary appeared to use wmic to create a process remotely on another Windows host. Later in the intrusion, the report notes access to LSASS memory and an attempt to obtain stored credentials.
